data.title: Boca Bearing Company announces new 2025 stock list with comprehensive range of needle bearings for modern industry.
data.description: A renowned expert in miniature needle bearings, Boca Bearing Company has unveiled its latest 2025 stock list. The updated catalog showcases a wide array of needle bearings ready for immediate purchase, catering to the varied requirements of modern industrial sectors.

data.title: ColoBarn acquires Omnis clients, moves them to new facility in Tempe, Phoenix. Successful acquisition of Omnis Network's colocation customer base.
data.description: A leading provider of colocation services and managed infrastructure in the Phoenix Metro Area, ColoBarn, has recently acquired Omnis Network's colocation customer base. This strategic move involves the transfer of all customers previously hosted in Omnis's facility to ColoBarn's. This acquisition marks a significant expansion for ColoBarn, increasing its customer base number and solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Usta International establishes Artificial Glaciers Kyrgyzstan to fight glacier retreat with tech, AI, and eco-tourism.
data.description: Usta International, located in Bishkek, has introduced an innovative project known as Artificial Glaciers Kyrgyzstan. This initiative combines patented engineering, artificial intelligence, and eco-tourism to address the issue of glacier retreat in the region. The project aims to protect Central Asia's crucial water resources while also promoting collaboration in the scientific community.

data.title: Sandpiper, LLC opens ECHO Suites Extended Stay by Wyndham in Reno in mid-July. Grand opening announced.
data.description: In mid-July of 2025, the newly launched ECHO Suites Extended Stay by Wyndham hotel made its debut in Richmond, Virginia. Sandpiper, LLC proudly revealed the opening of ECHO Suites Extended Stay by Wyndham in Reno, Nevada. This new hotel, developed from scratch, aims to provide exceptional accommodation services.

data.title: Wavytalk featured in TikTok Shop's New Arrivals with Blowout Boost Grande and exclusive deals. NY, Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: A renowned hair tools brand, Wavytalk, is set to introduce its newest product along with substantial discounts, creator content, and a back-to-school campus event in New York on August 22, 2025. Wavytalk is acclaimed for its salon-grade outcomes achieved at home.

data.title: Sam Boak & Boak & Sons to showcase at Canfield Fair with interactive booth and family activities in Youngstown, Ohio.
data.description: In Youngstown, an exterior contractor company led by Sam Boak, continues to prioritize community engagement by offering various services and hosting family-friendly events. The company, Boak & Sons, Inc., based in Youngstown, Ohio, has been showcasing its services and commitment to the community. Sam Boak, the owner and president, is proud to uphold this tradition. The activities include events that are welcoming to families. This news was released on August 22, 2025.

data.title: Embassy Suites at Hot Springs Convention Center completed a renovation to enhance guest experience. HOT SPRINGS, Ariz., Aug. 22, 2025 /PRNewswire-PRWeb - Atrium Hospitality, improved rooms, public spaces, and meeting venues to attract more visitors.
data.description: Embassy Suites by Hilton at Hot Springs Convention Center in Hot Springs, Arkansas, has undergone significant enhancements to solidify its position as the top choice for conventions, business trips, and leisure getaways. The upgrades were implemented by Atrium Hospitality, a prominent hotel owner in the country. The improvements aimed at enhancing the overall guest experience and elevating the hotel's appeal to various types of travelers. This move showcases Atrium Hospitality's commitment to providing top-notch amenities and services. Located in Hot Springs, Arkansas, the Embassy Suites by Hilton at the Convention Center stands out as a premier destination for travelers, offering a blend of comfort and luxury in a convenient location. The enhancements are poised to attract more visitors, boosting the hotel's reputation and potentially increasing bookings and revenue. This investment underscores Atrium Hospitality's dedication to maintaining high standards and ensuring guest satisfaction. The renovations are expected to position the hotel as a leading choice for events, business stays, and vacationers in the region. The Embassy Suites by Hilton at Hot Springs Convention Center is now ideally positioned to cater to a diverse range of guests, seeking to provide a memorable and enjoyable stay for all.

data.title: DataTalk's Connect, Log & Report streamlines reporting by creating reports from templates with custom content.
data.description: DataTalk Connect, Log & Report is a software that autonomously produces regular reports utilizing user-created MS Word or Excel formats. The software is capable of integrating custom text, tables, charts, and images by directly linking to technological and procedural data. The generated reports can be stored in PDF, Word, or XLS formats and distributed through various methods, such as...

data.title: Financial Technology Report lists top 25 WealthTech companies of 2025. WealthTech industry grows rapidly with innovative platforms.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in New York, The Financial Technology Report revealed the Top 25 WealthTech Companies of the year. The WealthTech sector is experiencing rapid expansion with companies integrating platforms that offer multi-asset portfolio management, AI-driven insights, and other innovative features. This list recognizes the leading players in the industry and highlights their contributions to the financial technology landscape.

data.title: Catrak Technologies introduces Drivestream, an affordable GPS solution for SMBs to track mobile workforce.
data.description: Catrak Technologies, a leading fleet security solutions provider, has introduced Drivestream, a budget-friendly GPS tracking option for businesses. The company is now accepting registrations for this cost-effective monitoring solution specifically aimed at small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Drivestream offers an efficient way to track mobile workforce activities at a competitive price point, making it an ideal solution for SMBs looking to optimize their operations.

data.title: Tom Lee predicts high probability of Ethereum flipping Bitcoin in market value as ETH hits new high. Fed hints at rate cuts, Wall Street strategist draws parallels with 1971 gold standard abandonment. ETH stock price surges.
data.description: Tom Lee, a Wall Street strategist, is making connections between Ethereum (ETH) and the 1971 gold standard abandonment, foreseeing a high likelihood of the cryptocurrency surpassing Bitcoin (BTC) in market value. Lee, the new Chairman of BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc. (BMNR), discussed in an interview how just as Wall Street emerged as the victor after the US abandoned the gold standard, Ethereum might arise as the dominant player in the crypto market. This speculation follows a cryptocurrency market surge on Friday due to Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell hinting at potential interest rate cuts in September. BitMine is actively accumulating a significant Ethereum treasury, according to Lee.

data.title: IRS crypto division head Trish Turner steps down after 3 months, joining 2 other execs leaving after 1 year.
data.description: The head of the IRS crypto division, Trish Turner, has announced her resignation after only a few months in the position. She is the third individual to hold this position to resign recently, with two private-sector executives preceding her, each serving approximately one year in the role.

data.title: The Supreme Court implies there are specific reasons to safeguard the Fed from political influence.
data.description: The Supreme Court has suggested that there are specific justifications for protecting the Federal Reserve from political influence.

data.title: Graphite One approves long-term incentive awards for 2025 to employees, officers, directors. TSXV: GPH, OTCQX: GPHOF.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 22, 2025, a press release stated that Graphite One Inc. (TSXV: GPH) (OTCQX: GPHOF) has received approval from its board of directors to distribute long-term incentive awards for the year 2025 to its employees, officers, directors, and stakeholders. This initiative aims to reward and motivate key individuals within the company.

data.title: China aims to strengthen SCO community with shared future; President Xi Jinping to attend Tianjin Summit in late August.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, it was reported that Chinese President Xi Jinping will participate in the SCO Tianjin Summit later this month. CGTN released details on the collaborative progress of member states across different sectors and China's dedication to strengthening ties within the SCO. This event signifies a significant step towards enhancing regional cooperation, given the anticipated attendance of key leaders and representatives.

data.title: Dow Jones and S&P 500 hit record highs after Powell's speech, Nvidia earnings awaited. Market rally continues.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's cautious remarks prompted a significant surge on Friday, leading to record highs for the S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices, while multiple stocks showed strong buying indications. Investors are now awaiting Nvidia's upcoming earnings report, which will serve as the next crucial indicator following the recent market uptrend.

data.title: Bitcoin enthusiasts wary of institutions; Preston Pysh notes concerns over them engaging in "institutional-like behaviors" with Bitcoin in recent interview.
data.description: Bitcoin enthusiasts are expressing worry about institutions engaging in activities typical of traditional financial institutions with Bitcoin, according to Preston Pysh in a recent podcast.

data.title: Bitcoin surges to $117K, wiping out bear positions and setting stage for record highs post Fed's Jackson Hole Symposium.
data.description: Following the Jackson Hole Symposium's closing speech, Bitcoin surged towards its range highs as the Federal Reserve suggested a potential policy shift. The cryptocurrency saw a notable increase in value as a response to this indication.

data.title: KB Home opens 3 new communities in Erie, Colorado's Canyon Creek area. Offers modern homes blending scenic beauty and outdoor recreation.
data.description: In Erie, Colorado, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled The Nest Classic, Reserve, and Villas at Canyon Creek, comprising three new-home communities. This renowned homebuilder has introduced these developments in response to the high demand for housing in the area, situated between Denver and Boulder. Erie is a charming town known for its picturesque surroundings, active community, and plentiful outdoor activities. The new homes are tailored to modern living preferences, boasting contemporary kitchen designs and other popular amenities to cater to residents' needs.
